description: Style Note Comfort has never looked as good as with these grey cotton shorts from john players. That crisp smart edge is blended perfectly with a laid back demeanor to give you pure casual style. Pair these with a nice casual shirt for a summery, relaxed look. Product Details Grey shorts with plastic button fastening and metal zipper, two side pockets, two back pockets and blue striped hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold, inside out Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
